title: Switch node only outputs matched value
symptom: When using a switch node, only the matched value is sent to the next node, while additional required data is missing.
applies_when: Need to send multiple pieces of data to a sub-workflow
not_this_if: Fallback is used to trigger the workflow
root_cause: The switch node is designed to output only the matched value by default. If additional data is needed, it must be combined from other nodes, such as a merge node, to ensure all required data is sent together.
fix_steps: Add a merge node after the switch node
Set the merge node to combine mode
Select 'Combine By All Possible Combinations' to merge outputs from both branches
Connect the merge node to the sub-workflow
agent_instruction: Use a merge node in combine mode to combine outputs from the switch node and send all required data.
